display.purpose: Page H1 and hero specimen scenes only.

headline.purpose: Major admin panels and high-level workflow sections.

body.purpose: Default dense product UI reading text.

label.purpose: Pills, tabs, badges, controls, and compact metadata.

mono.purpose: Generated CSS, diagnostics, and code preview windows.

title.purpose: Grouped settings, health boards, workflow panels, font cards, and role cards.

shadows.name: rise-1
shadows.purpose: Hairline lift for hover or active tabs.

shadows.name: rise-2
shadows.purpose: Interactive card hover and dirty settings emphasis.

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: Overlays, tooltips, menus, and diagnostic layers.

shadows.name: spotlight
shadows.purpose: Rare next-action or hero-specimen emphasis, maximum once per page.

shadows.name: inset-rail
shadows.purpose: Paper and code panels that should feel recessed rather than floating.

shadows.name: amber-halo
shadows.purpose: Copy-hover affordance and narrow transient celebrations.

motion.name: emphasized
motion.purpose: State changes that should decelerate cleanly.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action for publishing, saving, importing, or confirming the next meaningful workflow step.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { appearance: none; border: 1px solid var(--tasty-brand-blue); border-radius: var(--tasty-radius-control); background: var(--tasty-brand-blue); color: var(--tasty-paper); min-height: var(--tasty-btn-height-md); padding: 0 var(--tasty-control-padding-inline-roomy); font: 700 var(--tasty-type-label-size)/var(--tasty-line-height-control) var(--tasty-font-family-sans); transition: var(--tasty-transition-control); box-shadow: var(--tasty-shadow-primary-button); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--tasty-brand-blue-hover); border-color: var(--tasty-brand-blue-hover); box-shadow: var(--tasty-shadow-primary-button-hover); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 0; box-shadow: var(--tasty-shadow-focus), var(--tasty-shadow-primary-button-hover); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Neutral tool action for secondary operations that should stay available without competing with publish or save.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { appearance: none; border: 1px solid var(--tasty-control-border); border-radius: var(--tasty-radius-control); background: var(--tasty-control-surface); color: var(--tasty-ink); min-height: var(--tasty-btn-height-md); padding: 0 var(--tasty-control-padding-inline-roomy); font: 600 var(--tasty-type-label-size)/var(--tasty-line-height-control) var(--tasty-font-family-sans); transition: var(--tasty-transition-control); box-shadow: var(--tasty-control-shadow); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: var(--tasty-control-border-strong); background: var(--tasty-control-surface-hover); box-shadow: var(--tasty-control-shadow-hover); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 0; box-shadow: var(--tasty-shadow-focus); }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Unified rounded-rectangle input language for search, text, select, and textarea controls.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: var(--tasty-ink); font: 600 var(--tasty-type-label-size)/var(--tasty-line-height-label) var(--tasty-font-family-sans); } .ds-field input { min-height: var(--tasty-control-height-regular); border: 1px solid var(--tasty-control-border); border-radius: var(--tasty-radius-control); background: var(--tasty-control-surface); color: var(--tasty-ink); padding: 0 var(--tasty-control-padding-inline); font: 400 var(--tasty-type-body-size)/var(--tasty-line-height-body) var(--tasty-font-family-sans); transition: var(--tasty-transition-control); box-shadow: var(--tasty-control-shadow); } .ds-field input:hover { border-color: var(--tasty-control-border-strong); } .ds-field input:focus { outline: 0; border-color: var(--tasty-control-border-active); box-shadow: var(--tasty-shadow-focus); }

components.name: Toggle Switch
components.description: Compact setting toggle with squared thumb, blue checked state, and neutral off state.
components.css: .ds-toggle { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--tasty-space-3); color: var(--tasty-ink); font: 600 var(--tasty-type-body-size)/var(--tasty-line-height-body) var(--tasty-font-family-sans); } .ds-toggle input { position: absolute; opacity: 0; } .ds-toggle span { position: relative; width: var(--tasty-toggle-width); height: var(--tasty-toggle-height); border-radius: var(--tasty-toggle-track-radius); background: var(--tasty-toggle-track-off); box-shadow: var(--tasty-toggle-track-shadow); transition: var(--tasty-transition-control); } .ds-toggle span::after { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 2px; width: var(--tasty-toggle-thumb-size); height: var(--tasty-toggle-thumb-size); border-radius: var(--tasty-toggle-thumb-radius); background: var(--tasty-control-surface); box-shadow: var(--tasty-toggle-thumb-shadow); transition: transform var(--tasty-motion-hover) var(--tasty-easing-decel); } .ds-toggle input:checked + span { background: var(--tasty-toggle-track-on); box-shadow: var(--tasty-toggle-track-on-shadow); } .ds-toggle input:checked + span::after { transform: translateX(var(--tasty-toggle-translate)); } .ds-toggle input:focus-visible + span { box-shadow: var(--tasty-shadow-focus), var(--tasty-toggle-track-on-shadow); }

components.name: Resting Surface
components.description: Default top-level card surface for sections and quiet panels.
components.html:
Generated CSS

Review the stylesheet that will be served at runtime.
components.css: .ds-surface { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--tasty-surface-card-border); border-radius: var(--tasty-surface-card-radius); background: var(--tasty-surface-card); color: var(--tasty-ink); padding: var(--tasty-surface-card-padding); box-shadow: var(--tasty-shadow-flat); } .ds-surface::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0 0 auto; height: 1px; background: var(--tasty-gradient-hero-hairline); pointer-events: none; } .ds-surface h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font: 600 var(--tasty-type-panel-title-size)/var(--tasty-type-panel-title-line-height) var(--tasty-font-family-sans); } .ds-surface p { margin: 0; color: var(--tasty-slate); font: 400 var(--tasty-type-body-size)/var(--tasty-line-height-body) var(--tasty-font-family-sans); }

components.name: Inline Banner
components.description: Inline notification that uses full card chrome instead of a colored side rail.
components.html:
Generated CSS needs refresh

Regenerate before publishing role changes.
components.css: .ds-banner { position: relative; display: grid; gap: var(--tasty-space-1); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--tasty-surface-banner-border); border-radius: var(--tasty-surface-banner-radius); background: var(--tasty-surface-banner-background); color: var(--tasty-ink); padding: var(--tasty-surface-banner-padding-block) var(--tasty-surface-banner-padding-inline); } .ds-banner::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0 0 auto; height: 1px; background: var(--tasty-gradient-hero-hairline); } .ds-banner strong { font: 700 var(--tasty-type-body-size)/var(--tasty-line-height-body) var(--tasty-font-family-sans); } .ds-banner p { margin: 0; color: var(--tasty-slate); font: 400 var(--tasty-type-caption-size)/var(--tasty-line-height-relaxed) var(--tasty-font-family-sans); }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Compact status token for live, draft, pending, warning, and copied states.
components.css: .ds-pill-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--tasty-pill-gap); min-height: var(--tasty-pill-height-regular); border: 1px solid var(--tasty-border-subtle); border-radius: var(--tasty-radius-pill); background: var(--tasty-pill-background); color: var(--tasty-ink); padding: 0 var(--tasty-pill-padding-x-regular); font: 700 var(--tasty-type-label-dense-size)/var(--tasty-line-height-label) var(--tasty-font-family-sans); letter-spacing: var(--tasty-type-letter-spacing-pill); } .ds-pill-status span { width: var(--tasty-status-dot-size); height: var(--tasty-status-dot-size); border-radius: var(--tasty-status-dot-radius); background: var(--tasty-brand-blue); box-shadow: var(--tasty-status-dot-shadow-accent); }

components.name: Segmented Navigation
components.description: Header and inline navigation pattern with raised active tab and restrained hover lift.
components.html: LibrarySettingsTools
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-grid; grid-auto-flow: column; gap: 3px; padding: 3px; border: 1px solid var(--tasty-segmented-border); border-radius: var(--tasty-radius-panel); background: var(--tasty-segmented-surface); } .ds-nav a { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: var(--tasty-masthead-tab-height); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--tasty-radius-control); color: var(--tasty-slate); padding: 0 var(--tasty-space-3); text-decoration: none; font: 700 var(--tasty-type-label-size)/var(--tasty-line-height-label) var(--tasty-font-family-sans); transition: var(--tasty-transition-control); } .ds-nav a:hover { background: var(--tasty-masthead-tab-hover-background); border-color: var(--tasty-masthead-tab-hover-border); box-shadow: var(--tasty-shadow-rise-1); } .ds-nav a:focus-visible { outline: 0; box-shadow: var(--tasty-shadow-focus); } .ds-nav a.is-active { background: var(--tasty-masthead-tab-active-background); border-color: var(--tasty-masthead-tab-active-border); color: var(--tasty-brand-blue-hover); box-shadow: var(--tasty-shadow-rise-1); }

components.name: Preview Specimen Board
components.description: Paper-toned hero surface where managed font families are allowed to become the visual subject.
components.html:
Aa

The quick brown fox studies every delivery profile.
components.css: .ds-specimen { position: relative; display: grid; gap: var(--tasty-space-4); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--tasty-border-hero-soft); border-radius: var(--tasty-radius-hero); background: var(--tasty-gradient-role-priority); color: var(--tasty-ink); padding: var(--tasty-space-6); box-shadow: var(--tasty-shadow-inset-rail); } .ds-specimen::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0 0 auto; height: 1px; background: var(--tasty-gradient-hero-hairline); } .ds-specimen span { font: 700 var(--tasty-type-preview-glyph-size)/var(--tasty-line-height-glyph) var(--tasty-font-family-display); letter-spacing: var(--tasty-type-display-tracking); color: var(--tasty-ink-soft); } .ds-specimen p { margin: 0; max-width: 68ch; font: 400 var(--tasty-type-preview-paragraph-size)/var(--tasty-line-height-prose) var(--tasty-font-family-display); }

components.name: Code And Diagnostics Window
components.description: Ink window for generated CSS and diagnostics, limited to paper, blue, amber, and neutrals.
components.css: .ds-code { margin: 0; border: 1px solid rgba(var(--tasty-paper-rgb), 0.14); border-radius: var(--tasty-radius-hero); background: var(--tasty-preview-code-dark-bg); color: var(--tasty-preview-code-dark-text); padding: var(--tasty-space-6); box-shadow: var(--tasty-shadow-inset-rail); font: 400 var(--tasty-type-code-output-size)/var(--tasty-line-height-code) var(--tasty-font-family-mono); white-space: pre-wrap; } .ds-code .k, .ds-code .p { color: var(--tasty-preview-code-dark-keyword); } .ds-code .v { color: var(--tasty-preview-code-dark-string); }

narrative.overview: Tasty Foundry is a workbench for serious WordPress typography: compact, ordered, and tactile enough to make font operations feel safe. The interface serves site builders who are choosing families, delivery profiles, role assignments, generated CSS, integrations, and publishing state under real client pressure. It should feel like a precise admin tool that happens to be beautifully made, not a marketing surface that happens to contain settings.
keyCharacteristics: WordPress-native product UI with a more refined surface treatment than default admin chrome.
Restrained three-color palette: Tasty Blue, Warm Amber, Soft Cream, plus neutrals.
Font work stays visually louder than the shell around it.
State is shown through icons, copy, surface tone, filled or outlined chrome, and focus treatment, not red or green alone.
assets/css/tokens.css is the canonical source for color, spacing, typography, radius, shadow, motion, layer, and component contracts.
Components are familiar on purpose: buttons, fields, toggles, tabs, cards, rows, chips, and diagnostics should disappear into the workflow.

rules.name: The Three-Color Restraint Rule
rules.body: The product uses Tasty Blue, Warm Amber, Soft Cream, and neutrals. Green and red are prohibited in the admin theme.

rules.name: The Amber Permission Rule
rules.body: Warm Amber is not decoration. Valid uses are caution, warning, copy-hover affordance, active family warmth, dirty settings state, preview specimen paper, masthead punctuation, code values, and rare next-action emphasis.

rules.name: The Neutral Workbench Rule
rules.body: The shell field stays neutral. Do not reintroduce blue radials, diagonal beams, or full-surface color washes.

rules.name: The Display Quarantine Rule
rules.body: Display typography is reserved for the page H1 and hero specimen scenes only.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Interactive Rule
rules.body: Static surfaces do not float for decoration. If a shadow appears, it must communicate hover, selection, focus, overlay, pending action, or pressed state.

rules.name: The One Spotlight Rule
rules.body: The spotlight shadow appears at most once on a page. Two spotlights means no spotlight.

rules.name: The Hex Frontmatter, OKLCH Runtime Rule
rules.body: Canonical hex tokens are the interoperable contract. Runtime OKLCH values mirror the assets/css/tokens.css refinement. Do not create competing values in prose, PHP templates, or admin CSS.

rules.name: The Semantic Motion Rule
rules.body: Use --tasty-motion-hairline, --tasty-motion-tap, --tasty-motion-hover, --tasty-motion-reveal, --tasty-motion-stage, or --tasty-motion-celebrate by intent. Do not write ad-hoc durations in admin.css.

dos: Do keep font work first: families, delivery profiles, role assignments, generated CSS, and diagnostics must be more scannable than surrounding chrome.
Do use Tasty Blue for primary action, current selection, focus, and information state.
Do use Warm Amber only for documented amber moments.
Do make keyboard focus visible and preserve WordPress admin semantics.
Do use the composite transition tokens (--tasty-transition-control, --tasty-transition-card, --tasty-transition-rail, --tasty-transition-fade) instead of restating property lists.
donts: Don't build generic WordPress settings pages that feel like long option dumps.
Don't create bloated font-plugin clutter that exposes implementation details before user intent.
Don't use noisy SaaS dashboard tropes, decorative gradients, fake metrics, or empty excitement.
Don't make the interface look AI-generated through repetitive cards, excess badges, decorative glow, or arbitrary color.
Don't rely on red or green state color.
Don't use side-stripe borders as card, row, alert, or callout accents.
Don't add nested cards inside cards.
Don't fork card chrome. New card-like containers must use .tasty-fonts-surface or join the shared hairline selector list with a documented reason.
